arts.sum: Aaron Ashley has taken a look at all of this weekend's Championship matches and provided a score prediction for each game.

arts.ttl: Derby County make contract decision over striker
arts.sum: Dajaune Brownhas signed a new contract at Derby County that will run until the summer of 2027, the club has confirmed. Brown has elevated himself into the first-team squad on a regular basis at Pride Park on the back of a hugely productive spell in the north-east.

arts.ttl: Sheffield United Have Shown They Are No Longer the Underdogs in the Championship
arts.sum: After experiencing the highs of gaining promotion to the Premier League in the 2022/23 campaign, the inevitable setback of relegation subsequently followed as Sheffield United finished rock-bottom of the top tier last season. The Blades are determined to reclaim their place in the top flight however and their manager Chris Wilder has been instrumental in […] The post Sheffield United Have Shown They Are No Longer the Underdogs in the Championship appeared first on Sheff United Way.

arts.ttl: Sheffield United vs Derby predictions: Buoyant Blades can bank another victory
arts.sum: Sheffield United host Derby in the Championship at Bramall Lane on Saturday and Dan Childs expects the home side to ease to a fairly comfortable success.

arts.ttl: Every word Paul Warne said on Derby County, Sheffield United and an 'amazing' achievement
arts.sum: And this weekend's trip to Bramall Lane will be extra special given Warne will oversee his 400th game as a manager while also celebrate two years of being in charge at Pride Park. They've got a really good team, but they're really well coached and you have to have them both to have success.
